creator: makc@issp.ac.ru
text:
I can't reproduce this

PID USERNAME    THR PRI NICE   SIZE    RES STATE    TIME   WCPU COMMAND
 868 root          1  96    0 54364K 37444K select   1:40  0.68% Xorg
10037 makc          1  96    0 27016K 22148K select   0:01  0.49% kxgenerator

You can try recompile kxgenerator without CPUTYPE flag.
And don't forget to backup your xorg.conf before running kxgenerator!

Max.
